title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kaido, Unknown person #14, Kinemon, Oden as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As expected by his family and retainers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai who had endured the pain for five years on his own...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Finally couldn't bear it anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No longer able to control his emotions...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A river of tears streamed down his face...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: This Kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I will make him pay!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Finally you've spoken them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The words we've been waiting for all this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Now!! Witness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What happened next!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The greatest turmoil caused by a weeping open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At his side, the nine men he had picked up and made his samurai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Eh: I'm not sure if I'm

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Illuminated by the crimson light of a setting sun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is something you'll only witness once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ... chip. 969 /Fin

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Their eyes set on kaido...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their path was also a sad story of the past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their destination was the public execution of Kozuki Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These men, hungry for a fight, seemed clad in red flames...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until the the the "legendary hour", an event passed down to future generations, has come...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As did the swords on their waists, like reflections of their burning lives

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people of Wano would later come to respectfully call these loyal men...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The nine Red Scabbards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please do not avert your eyes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: - On y EST Enfin!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
